name: SentinelX402
tagline: Free threat intelligence API with built-in CERT-In India advisories
description: The only agent-native threat intelligence API with proprietary Indian government threat data (CERT-In, CSK). Plus real-time phishing detection, CVE risk analysis, IP reputation. 1,000 free requests, no signup.
keywords: CVE risk intelligence for AI agents
data_sources: CSK Cyber Swachhta Kendra (malware alerts) — PROPRIETARY

tools.name: domain_risk_lookup
tools.description: Detect phishing and malicious domains in real-time. Returns risk score (0-100), threat type, confidence, and related suspicious domains.

tools.name: ip_reputation
tools.description: Check if an IP is a known C2 server, botnet node, or malicious host.

tools.name: threat_feed
tools.description: Get latest threat indicators with pagination.

tools.name: cve_risk_analysis
tools.description: CVE risk analysis with exploit probability, patch urgency, and ransomware risk.

tools.name: recent_critical_cves
tools.description: Recent critical CVEs from the last 7 days.

tools.name: cve_search
tools.description: Search CVEs by keyword with enhanced risk scoring.

tools.name: india_advisory_list
tools.description: List India-specific threat advisories from CERT-In (Indian Computer Emergency Response Team) and CSK (Cyber Swachhta Kendra). PROPRIETARY — only available in SentinelX402.

tools.name: india_advisory_detail
tools.description: Get specific CERT-In advisory by code (CIAD-YYYY-XXXX or CIVN-YYYY-XXXX). Includes CVE references, affected products, and extracted threat domains. PROPRIETARY.

differentiators: Only agent-native API with CERT-In India advisories
Only API covering UPI fraud and Indian bank phishing
Drop-in integrations for LangChain, CrewAI, OpenAI, MCP
Zero friction — no signup, no API key
